blocks.text: Stonelifting is a traditional demonstration of strength and capability. Let's give this a modern twist.

The goal of this installation is a test of strength. Ideally one that anyone can participate in, but few can complete, with an added mathematical payload. The installation is simple, a set of 6 pedestals with shaped dishes. One of each of the following forms:
The progression of stones could share the same circumsphere (sphere that touches all of the corners of the shape), and would thusly get heavier as the side count increased.
The person who can lift all stones onto their pedestals would receive some sort of prize/gift.
